---
title: "Window borders are gone."
date: 2008-04-24
forum: General Help
---

### Post by theelk801 on 2008-04-24
I just upgrade to Hardy today and my window borders are almost completely transparent. I don't know what to do.

EDIT: A small update. The window will partially and then fully appear until I, for example, switch to a new tab, thus changing the text on it and returning it to invisible mode.

EDIT2: Here's my xorg for whoever wants it:
